programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 3
programme.desc: Join the guys as they do what they do best: talk with their mouths full. The boys will surely be eating a well-balanced meal and dishing out what they've been up to at home.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 4
programme.desc: You're cordially invited to a one-of-a-kind dinner party at Joe, Q, Murr, and Sal's homes from the comfort of your own.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 5
programme.desc: The guys dine and discuss their week. Find out who can make the best meal and how long Q's beard has become.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 6
programme.desc: The guys put their culinary skills to the test by serving dishes the viewers requested. Plus, find out if Joe grew a mustache.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bad Carma
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q showcase questionable products to participants, and then rescue strangers who don't need to be rescued. Later, the big loser must hit and run his mouth to get himself out of trouble.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Toll Booth Corrector
programme.desc: The guys pose as suspicious nutritionists trying to recruit clients, before quitting their jobs for strange reasons. Afterwards, the gang goes head-to-head in a wild debate judged by a stranger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as concierges in a hotel lobby, and then commit insurance fraud with the help of some confused strangers. Afterwards, tonight's loser suffers a personal punishment that's anything but child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rock Botton
programme.desc: The guys 'do the farts' with actor Jeff Daniels, and then try to get strangers to take their sides in ridiculous arguments. Later, tonight's loser finds himself up against a wall around a group of college students.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: It's Electric
programme.desc: The guys pitch whimsical TV show idea to focus groups and then go to the park with their 'daughters' who share unpopular opinions. The loser heads to the spa for an electrifying punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 1
programme.desc: Be a guest at a dinner party with the stars of the show. Join Sal, Joe, Q and Murr aka 'The Tenderloins,' as they dish about their week, their friendship and whatever else is thrown on their dinner table.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 2
programme.desc: Take a seat at the table as the guys dish out what they've been up to this week at home. Get a glimpse of how the guys really hang out and, after some grub, they'll battle it out over who will be hosting next week's meal.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Joke and Dagger
programme.desc: The guys crash a gallery opening where their antics aren't appreciated, they pass bizarre judgment on unsuspecting grocery shoppers, and the loser takes a spin on a terrifying wheel where one wrong move could have deadly consequences.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Car Sick
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q freak out a focus group by reading ridiculous answers, and then participate in a thrilling toilet paper shootout in their favourite market. Plus, the loser’s fancy dinner party turns into the messiest ride of his life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tied and Feathered
programme.desc: The guys teach a crash course in sorry behaviour, ask strangers to settle bizarre debates and spread surprisingly good news at the mall. Plus, tonight’s loser has his hands tied when a day at the park turns into a frightful mess.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Smushed
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr give a security presentation that’s anything but safe, then hold hands with strangers in the park.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Human Pinata

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sweat the Small Things
programme.desc: Teaching an art class never looked so, bad. A dartboard and a home invasion have the contestants stressed and competitive.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Top Priority of NASA

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Drone Care

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Sets Itself, Lights Itself
programme.desc: Michael loses a credit card in a series of absorbing containers, and then in an art store, he shakes off sloppy handwriting to reveal fancy calligraphy. Later, a catering assistant gets spooked when chinaware sets itself.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: A Living Trilobite

programme.desc: Autumn flavours are in the spotlight as 'The Kitchen' serves a plate of fall favourites. Geoffrey shares his apple cider salmon and Katie Lee makes a brown butter safe butternut squash bake. Plus, learn easy fall appetizers with Sunny.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Squash N' Pumpkins
programme.desc: The Kitchen is celebrating fall with the two stars of the season: squash and pumpkins! Katie Lee makes her sweet and sticky grilled pumpkin BBQ-glazed pork chops and Sunny Anderson whips up her quick wild rice and sausage stuffed mini butternut squash.

programme.title: The Kitchen: 'Sweater Weather' Weeknight Warrior

programme.title: Chopped: Clambake Stakes

programme.title: Chopped: College Competition

programme.title: Chopped: Grills On! Game On!
programme.desc: When the ovens and fryers are turned off, four chefs have no choice but to get their grill on! A rare meat hits the heat in round one, and a frozen food favorite in the second basket might not thrill the competitors.

programme.title: Outrageous Pumpkins: 7 Deadly Jack-o'-Lanterns

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Volume One
programme.desc: Explore the mysteries and legends surrounding seven spine tingling sites.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Volume Two
programme.desc: Dine with ghosts then party with the paranormal at a haunted nightclub. Head underground in Portland where unsuspecting folks were held captive and then hit up a haunted mansion and tattoo parlor.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Volume Three
programme.desc: In this hour of Most Terrifying Places in America, we keep crisscrossing the country to tour even more paranormal hotspots. We visit a castle outside of Seattle that is haunted by a suicidal monk, and an early American Inn near Boston.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Volume Four
programme.desc: In this instalment of the Most Terrifying Place in America, we visit the deepest, darkest, haunted spots our country has to offer. We explore a bar in Chicago that contains forces so dark it causes visitors to turn horribly violent.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Volume Five
programme.desc: In this hour of the Most Terrifying Place in America, we're touring more of the spookiest spots in the country! We visit a defunct amusement park that delivers a unique 'thrill', and a residence so haunted the owner rarely sleeps there!

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Volume Six
programme.desc: In this hour, continue the search for places that'll make you scream. Stop by an old prison where ghosts of the country's worst violent offenders roam, and a Chicago home that inspired the legend of the Devil Baby.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Volume Seven
programme.desc: Visit an Illinois cemetery and a theater in Cincinnati that was built over a mass grave.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Unnatural World
programme.desc: From a Nebraska road where a farmer hung his entire family to an Upstate New York farmhouse where a demon has long overstayed its welcome, we explore locations linked to unnerving and terrifying tales.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Haunted Road Trips
programme.desc: From a Mississippi bridge where a murderer was hanged for his crimes to Savannah's oldest operating hotel built prior to the Civil War, these terrifying roads and haunted roadside spots will make any driver want to lock the doors and roll up the windows.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: No Mushroom for Error

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Rise and Don't Shine

programme.desc: Find out how speed skates, rubber, cocoa beans, and bulk chocolate are made.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Revenge of the Killer Queen
programme.desc: Advanced archaeology and cutting edge science join forces to unmask the truth behind Cleopatra's enduring legacy, not as ancient Egypt's most celebrated seductress, but as a political mastermind and ruthless, cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Curse of the Ice Princess
programme.desc: After a 2,500-year-old mummy is discovered in Siberia, locals report strange, cataclysmic events that point to an ancient curse; using cutting-edge archaeology, experts reveal who this person was and if they've unleashed something sinister.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Alien Ice Towers
programme.desc: When strange towers of ice are found growing from in a barren, water-starved desert, experts speculate why these structures have uncanny similarities to extraterrestrial formations recently discovered on Pluto's alien landscape.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Screaming Mummy
programme.desc: The Screaming Mummy is one of Egypt's greatest mysteries: a mummy with a terrifying expression frozen in agony. New discoveries reveal the connection between this horrific discovery and a pharaoh's murder, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Curse of the Ice Princess
programme.desc: After a 2,500-year-old mummy is discovered in Siberia, locals report strange, cataclysmic events that point to an ancient curse; using cutting-edge archaeology, experts reveal who this person was and if they've unleashed something sinister.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Alien Ice Towers
programme.desc: When strange towers of ice are found growing from in a barren, water-starved desert, experts speculate why these structures have uncanny similarities to extraterrestrial formations recently discovered on Pluto's alien landscape.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Tut's Curse: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal if King Tut's tomb is indeed cursed, as it is said to have killed nine people. The latest science might finally answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to investigate more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Hell Island
programme.desc: Explore a ghost town that was once a dangerous industrial hellscape, a giant warship at the bottom of the ocean, and a top secret relic that could have changed the Cold War.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Soviet Doomsday Device
programme.desc: Explore what happened to a classified Soviet machine built to prevent all-out nuclear war, a top secret Nazi facility, and a strange tower that left an enduring legacy.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Underwater Ghost Prison
programme.desc: An entrance to the underworld in the American wild, a haunting Soviet underwater prison, and a strange complex of towers in a forest of ice are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Desert Ghost Fort
programme.desc: A secret Russian military base in the Gobi Desert, a strange complex in an American wasteland, and a relic high atop a mountain are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting on Plague Island
programme.desc: A strange complex of buildings on a remote tropical island was once home to a large seaside community, but today, locals avoid the area and claim that it's haunted. New discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: America's Doomsday Town
programme.desc: A strange deserted city in America's heartland, an eerie gigantic wall deep in snow-capped mountains, and a mysterious top-secret Soviet facility were built and then abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: House of Horror
programme.desc: An eerie set of buildings in Paris is evidence of an unspeakable evil. New discoveries reveal the horrific things that happened here, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Jungle of the Damned
programme.desc: At an infamous prison in the Amazon, the most dangerous criminals on earth faced hard labour, a hostile environment and death by guillotine. Today, it's deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this hellish compound was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secret of Supervillain Island
programme.desc: On a strange island off the coast of Croatia, the mysterious ruins of a long-abandoned hideout look like they once belonged to a James Bond supervillain, and new discoveries reveal why it was built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hell on Blood Island
programme.desc: An island of dense jungle is home to an abandoned complex with a dark past of bloodshed and rebellion, and new discoveries at this deserted place reveal why it was built and the gruesome circumstances of its downfall.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The World's Strangest Disaster Zones
programme.desc: A deserted city half buried, whole villages swallowed by the earth, temples turned to rubble, and an arctic town facing a deadly threat. Within these structures are the echoes of history; each haunted shell now ready to tell its own story.

programme.title: Unearthed: Draining the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Cutting-edge tech is helping experts investigate the mysteries of the Bermuda Triangle like never before, and as new discoveries reveal alien phenomena at the bottom of the ocean floor, they might finally uncover the truth behind this strange place.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Scene of the Crime
programme.desc: When Brad McGarry is discovered murdered in his Ohio basement, residents in this sleepy coalmining town are left in shock. Detectives suspect robbery but then a friend comes forward and points them in the direction of someone whom they least expected.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Twisted Upside Down
programme.desc: The streets of Kalamazoo, Michigan are awash with rumors about 69-year-old, William Gray.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Things Weigh on You
programme.desc: Jeffrey Franklin, a deaf sixteen-year-old, is dead. Now, body-cam video and original audio capture detectives' hunt for what happened. As the investigation unravels, GPS data and shocking admissions give Jeffrey the justice he desperately deserves.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Wished My Son Were Dead
programme.desc: It has been more than 25 years, yet Joyce Alexander is still terrified of her son, William Patrick Alexander. She fears he holds her responsible for his horrifying crime, and is convinced he is plotting his revenge from prison.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Mother's Lies
programme.desc: Years after her interview, Cindy Taylor revisits memories of her mother. When Cindy was a teen, the sudden death of her father shattered her world. Years later, she learned her father's death was just one of the deadly secrets her mother had been hiding.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: I Am The Devil
programme.desc: A missing Colorado woman's roommate claims she'll do anything to help find her, but investigators fear they may have a rare female psychopath on their hands. Later, a killer's angry outbursts could be real, or just an act put on by a skilled manipulator.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: In the Lion's Cage
programme.desc: Linda Wittmier and Terry Jo Howard both fell in love with James Michael Randall. And both suffered when they discovered the monster that lurked inside him. But they never realized how lucky they were to survive his twisted sexual desire to kill.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Mother's Lies
programme.desc: Years after her interview, Cindy Taylor revisits memories of her mother. When Cindy was a teen, the sudden death of her father shattered her world. Years later, she learned her father's death was just one of the deadly secrets her mother had been hiding.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: I Am The Devil
programme.desc: A missing Colorado woman's roommate claims she'll do anything to help find her, but investigators fear they may have a rare female psychopath on their hands. Later, a killer's angry outbursts could be real, or just an act put on by a skilled manipulator.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Cop and the Killer
programme.desc: When Walt Chavis joined the police force, he was prepared to risk his life, but he never imagined the greatest threat he would face would be his own brother or that one day he would be forced to choose between his duty and his family.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Home Sweet Nightmare
programme.desc: Sheila Janutolo dreaded being alone with her husband Jim Cruz. Over the years, she had learned to fear him and his violent temper. But when she got a call that he'd been arrested for a ghastly crime, she was certain police had the wrong man.

programme.title: American Monster: Into the Swamp
programme.desc: At a family-run construction company, brothers and cousins work hard together - and play even harder. But when one of them vanishes, no one has answers. The mystery of his disappearance - and the salacious betrayal behind it - isn't solved for 20 years.

programme.title: American Monster: Momma's Girl
programme.desc: Great-Grandfather Arthur Burney knows he's lucky to have such a large loving family. But when a dead body is discovered everyone becomes a suspect - and it'll take an unexpected tip-off to reveal the mastermind behind the murder.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Blood Money
programme.desc: John joins police on a strange and twisting missing persons case that turns fatal, sending investigators on the trail of Alejandro Castillo; Cal takes on the case of Leticia Smith, a woman on the run from a terrible crime with nothing to lose.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Deadly Poser
programme.desc: Ex-Marine Raymond 'R.J.' McLeod seems like a knight in shining armor to one single mom, but as John Walsh reveals, she was far from safe. Then, Callahan Walsh discovers how rapper Maurice Nesbitt's constant abuse of his girlfriend eventually turns deadly.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: A Personal Mission
programme.desc: When a double shooting leaves one woman dead and another clinging to life, John joins police on the trail of fugitive Lenell Kirby. Callahan takes on the mysterious murder of a dear Walsh family friend, Lindsay Harris.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Campus Tragedy
programme.desc: John Walsh spotlights freshman who allegedly introduces a knife to a fistfight that claims a star college student's life. Later, Callahan Walsh looks for Thayne Smika, who, police believe, shoots his roommate in cold blood over back rent.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Monkey in the Middle
programme.desc: A man finds himself living between hostile neighbors on both sides, including a former marine with severe PTSD. Their campaign of intimidation ramps up to the point of no return, ending with a deadly confrontation on the street outside their homes.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Good Fences Make Dead Neighbors
programme.desc: Instead of a brand new start, a man's move to Canyon Country, California, finds him locked in a bizarre and increasingly acrimonious eight year feud with his neighbor – that is finally resolved with blasts from a shotgun.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Homeowner Hell
programme.desc: A couple settles in Josephine County, Oregon, where they learn their new neighbor has a deadly past. Now, as relations sour and tempers flare, blood will be spilled on this land.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Hysteria Lane
programme.desc: A couple who tragically lost their son are thrilled when a family with two boys moves in across the street. But the relationship soon sours, engulfing all of them in conflict, accusation, and finally a deadly shooting.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: Red Mustang
programme.desc: When 22-year-old LeAnne Martinez fails to pick up her daughter from her mother's house, her family worries. Her red Mustang is missing, and what they find inside her home will leave them forever scarred.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: On Her Own
programme.desc: Native Swede, Marioara Shand, is setting out on her own in Taos, New Mexico, after a recent breakup. One day in July of 2002, police discover her body in a brutal, bloody scene inside her new home.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: He Made Me Do It
programme.desc: Lila Warwick is a loving and hands-on grandmother of eight whose door is always open for holidays, birthdays or for anyone in need of a helping hand.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Verge of Destruction
programme.desc: We've all heard about the fallout shelters used for refuge during World War II, the deadly firebombing of Tokyo, and the D-Day invasion on the beaches of Normandy but there are more secrets.

programme.title: Nazis vs. Aliens

programme.title: Hollywood vs. Commies
programme.desc: The amazing story of how Hollywood took on Communism and played a key role in winning the Cold War.

programme.desc: The life and exploits of outlaw Jesse James are recounted.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Nazi Gold

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Rural Retreat Historical Society
programme.desc: Mike, Robert and the team travel to the Rural Retreat Historical Society in Rural Retreat, Virginia. Mike sets up rigging from the rooftop for an outdoor clock while Robert salvages a vault door and bank teller station.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Free Will House
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawg team travels to Free Will House in Huntington, West Virginia, where they salvage a bathtub, sitz bath and kitchen cabinets.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: St. Mary's Rectory
programme.desc: The team finds cast-iron mantles, a built-in cabinet, and a stained glass front doorway.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Grace Family Church
programme.desc: The Black Dog Salvage crew travels to Vinton, Virginia, in order to salvage a massive piece of stained glass from the Grace Family Church. They run into challenges when equipment is delayed.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Trinity Lutheran Church
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs go to Greencastle, PA, to salvage an old church that is being restored for a physical therapy office. The team struggles to figure out the best way to remove the windows, salvage the large bell and execute an idea for a console.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: St. Andrews Church Spires
programme.desc: The Dawgs help save copper elements from the St. Andrews Catholic Church spires in Roanoke, VA. The guys also bring in an expert to learn more about a large lithograph from a previous salvage.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Blown-out Beach House
programme.desc: A family with many fond memories of summer vacations in their Lewes, Delaware, beach house finds that their cottage's awkward layout isn't working. The space is maximized by vaulting the ceiling as well as adding an open-concept ground floor.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Bethany Beach Bunks
programme.desc: A family with a new baby is bursting out of their cramped bungalow in Bethany Beach, Delaware. Marnie creates more space for the family by opening up the kitchen, relocating a laundry room and building magical bunk beds to accommodate the children.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Sun Room to Fun Room
programme.desc: After years of pleading from their daughters, this couple has agreed to renovate their '90s themed house. Now it's up to Marnie to bring their house into the 21st century and make it comfortable enough for three generations.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Seaside Spectacular
programme.desc: A family living in their dream location of Bethany Beach, DE, calls on Marnie to save their cramped 1980s beach house. Marnie's mission is to drag it into the present with a nautical makeover and make it look as beautiful as the beaches around it.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Big Beach Dreams
programme.desc: Marnie's friend Leslie has achieved her dream of buying a beautiful house on the beach, but it needs a lot of work. Now she needs Marnie's help to turn it into the beach home and entertaining hub she's always dreamed about.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: A House Built on Sand
programme.desc: A couple's beach cottage in Dewey, Delaware, is just a few steps to the beach, but the house has no curb appeal and feels dated. They enlist Marnie to give it a face lift, but during demolition, Marnie finds that the foundation is sinking into the sand.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: On the Hunt for a St. Pete Beach Retreat in Florida
programme.desc: After vacationing in St. Pete Beach, Florida, for many years, a couple purchases an older condo in a prime location that needs a total gut job. Managing a long-distance project from their home in New York poses a challenge, as does the budget.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Three's Company on the Gulf Coast
programme.desc: A family searches for a beach retreat in Gulf Shores, AL. While they have different opinions on what type of house they should get, they all agree they want to live near the beach.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Westport Wonder
programme.desc: An outdoor enthusiast couple loves spending time at the beach in Westport, WA, and decide to buy a vacation home. The house they choose needs a major overhaul, but their limited budget may prevent their planned renovation.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Gulf Shores Gut Job
programme.desc: A couple gears up to make the coastal paradise of Gulf Shores, AL, their forever home. The couple hunts for a bargain and lands the perfect place in need of big-time renovations.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Boise, ID

programme.title: Man v. Food: Grand Rapids, MI

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Beastly Burgers
programme.desc: Michael Symon gets things started in Boston where a whole smoked hog is getting the royal treatment with a marinade injection, a salt crust and a foil wrap for crispy skin. Then in Phoenix, a wolf of a burger gets topped with smoked pulled pork.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hawaii Fried Dough
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives in the Aloha State for the 'Iolani Fair. This school fundraiser fair in Honolulu features Hawaiian-style fried dough in the Malasada Ice Cream Sandwich and Sweet Roll Sliders.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Steak Out
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is in carnivore mode for the San Angelo Stock Show and Rodeo in Texas.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Toastbusters
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Hunt County Fair in Greenville, Texas, and makes short work of the Smoke Bomb and the French toast crunch burger. But it's the blue bacon cheesecake that really knocks him out.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Deep-Fried Inferno
programme.desc: Where there's smoke, there's fire, and Noah Cappe is ready to have his taste buds fired up at the Spencerport Volunteer Firemen's Association Carnival in New York. From the Flaming Weck to the Five Alarm Fries, there's plenty of sizzle.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Grillers in the Mist
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to New York for the Long Island Fun Fest and some Empire State eats. He can't resist a pizza covered in gooey penne alla vodka or a fancy Hamptons Dog, and he also tries the ultimate Italian-American combo, a Cannoli Calzone.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: My Fair Latte
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts off in Chippewa Falls, Wis., at the Northern Wisconsin State Fair. The Wisconsin woods are the inspiration for the loaded Campfire Burger, and the state's famous cheese curds make an appearance in the Hot Chick.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Columbus, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's countrywide edible expedition brings him to Columbus, Ohio. His massive meals include a bacon-wrapped hot dog with a crazy combination of toppings and a footlong chicken burrito blanketed in ghost pepper sauce.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Providence, Rhode Island
programme.desc: Adam visits Providence, Rhode Island for a unique grilled pizza and for the infamous Triple Murder Burger. Adam's journey concludes with him coaching a rugby player through 15 fully loaded hot wieners in 45 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: St. Louis, MO
programme.desc: Casey Webb visits St. Louis, Missouri, in search of the biggest and best the city has to offer. He encounters a four-pound meatball and tackles a New York-style pizza so massive he'll need the help of a partner to take it down.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Los Angeles, California
programme.desc: Casey travels to sunny Los Angeles for some epic eats including a 2.5-pound fusion burrito loaded with every ingredient in the kitchen and drenched in hot sauce 600 times hotter than a jalapeno.

programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Family Legacy/ Paint Misbehavin'
programme.desc: Gramma tells Cricket and Tilly that there’s treasure buried on their property.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Trailer Trouble/ Mansion Madness
programme.desc: Nancy's trailer is stolen by her old biker gang, and the kids resolve to get it back. Cricket house-sits for Remy, but things go awry when the rest of the Greens visit.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gargoyle Gals/ Supermarket Scandal
programme.desc: To impress her new friend, Tilly claims she saw stone gargoyles come to life.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Reckoning Ball/ Clubbed
programme.desc: Chip Whistler returns to take revenge on the Greens, but is forced to apologize. Andromeda and Tilly follow Gloria to a club where they must 'cure' her of her amnesia.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Halloween Moon
programme.desc: On Halloween night, Spider-Man must team-up with the incredible Hulk to stop Man-Wolf, a super-strong gamma-powered werewolf, from infecting the rest of Manhattan.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Horizon High- Part One
programme.desc: Peter is accepted into Horizon High: a school for geniuses, where his best friend Harry Osborn was just suspended. Peter makes his debut as Spider-man and must battle the Vulture.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Horizon High- Part Two
programme.desc: Spider-Man must work to stop the Scorpion from wreaking havoc at the museum.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Party Animals
programme.desc: Horizon High throws a dance in honor of Harry being exonerated, but Norman asks Harry to stay at the Oz Academy.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Northwest Mansion Mystery
programme.desc: Pacifica asks Dipper to bust a poltergeist haunting the Northwest Mansion, before he wreaks havoc on her fancy party.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Barry Cuda/ Suite Retreat
programme.desc: Cricket uses his first tip from working at Big Coffee to buy a singing toy fish. Gramma kicks the family out of the house for the day.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hurty Tooth / Sleepover Sisters
programme.desc: The Greens go on a family visit to the dentist's office where Cricket is determined to avoid Dr. Enamel and power through his toothache.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Mini-Maximum Trouble
programme.desc: When Fred runs into a string of bad luck, Megan reveals to Hiro that she's trying to uncover the true identities of Big Hero 6 for her school's newspaper.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Trading Chips / Mini Noodle Burger Max
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Movie: Pokemon 13: Zoroark - Master of Illusions
programme.desc: Movie

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: That's Some Spicy Island Research!
programme.desc: Our heroes are visiting Poni Island for their school research projects, but they’re not the only ones with big plans.

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Showdown on Poni Island!
programme.desc: Ash’s research project is all about battling, but who will that battling involve?

programme.title: The Owl House: The First Day
programme.desc: During Luz's first day of Magic School, curiosity gets the best of her, and she finds herself thrown into the Delinquent Track, where she's not allowed to learn magic.

programme.title: The Owl House: Adventures in the Elements
programme.desc: Luz needs to learn a new spell, so Eda takes her to the most magical place on the island to train.

programme.title: The Owl House: The Intruder
programme.desc: Luz and King must defend The Owl House from a mysterious intruder.

programme.title: The Owl House: Enchanting Grom Fright
programme.desc: Luz experiences Grom, Hexside's version of prom, and it's not what she expects.

programme.title: The Owl House: Understanding Willow
programme.desc: Luz, Willow, and Amity take a trip down Memory Lane.

programme.title: The Owl House: Wing It Like Witches
programme.desc: Not your average underdog story.

programme.title: The Owl House: Really Small Problems
programme.desc: King confides in a carnival fortune teller who makes his dream come true, but it comes at a cost.

programme.title: The Owl House: Sense and Insensitivity
programme.desc: When King becomes a bestselling author, he learns a valuable lesson in reading the fine print.

programme.title: The Owl House: Agony of a Witch
programme.desc: On a school field trip to the mysterious Emperor's Castle, Luz strays from the group and into danger.

programme.title: The Owl House: Young Blood, Old Souls
programme.desc: Luz's skills as a witch are put to the test when she attempts the impossible.

programme.title: Movie: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Dracula becomes overprotective of his daughter when a young boy falls for her.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Shorts: Ghoul Friend
programme.desc: Mickey Mouse finds himself in silly situations around the world.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.desc: A teenager returns home after a night out with friends, and discovers his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed
programme.desc: Eileen and Derrick Severs disappeared from their home in the small village of Hambleton in Great Britain, and police found evidence which suggested foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Micro-Clues
programme.desc: When a boy is found dead in a cornfield, traces of water from his body help lead investigators to the boy's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: DNA Dragnet

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Family Lies
programme.desc: After a family of six is found brutally murdered in a rural Texas town, a perpetrator confesses to the crime.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Murder in Miami
programme.desc: In 1987 Kris Maharaj, a wealthy British businessman, is sentenced to death for a double homicide in a luxury Miami hotel. The case seems open and shut until an attorney uncovers powerful evidence supporting an alternative explanation of the killings.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Murder In Broad Daylight
programme.desc: Sentencing a reformed Chicago gang member to death reveals corruption at every level of the criminal justice system.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Eye for an Eye
programme.desc: After seventeen years on death row for a mass murder at Chuck E. Cheese's restaurant in Aurora, Nathan Dunlap's fate resides in the hands of one man, Governor John Hickenlooper.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Double Jeopardy
programme.desc: The wife and two children of an Air Force captain are murdered in Fayetteville, North Carolina, and Army sergeant Tim Hennis is sentenced to death for the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gone Ballistic
programme.desc: When a middle-aged man is gunned down in his own home, the motive appears to be robbery, but a mysterious greeting card blows the investigation wide open.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Life is a Gamble
programme.desc: The MSO family loads up the hot rods and heads to Vegas to meet up with King Donnie and a group of West Coast racers. Molly and Chelsea step up to take on the challenge but the roads are unusually slick, making it a struggle to bring home a payday.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Revenge Racing
programme.desc: JJ calls up a group of racers who have all beaten the MSO before and challenges them all to a rematch. Then high altitudes wreak havoc on tunes and motors in Idaho as NOLA surges ahead in the NPK standings.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Everyday I'm Hustling
programme.desc: The second night of racing against teams that have beaten the MSO continues, only this time Dynamite Dave rolls in with some new heavy hitters from Missouri. After being down from the first night, Memphis can't afford to let it happen again.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: Show up or Shut Up
programme.desc: After the conclusion of last season, JJ heard from racers all over the country who wanted a shot at MSO's title, so he's doing it again! This time, however, there are more teams, more money up for grabs and higher stakes than ever before.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Race Night in America: Untouchables
programme.desc: Oklahoma racers meet up for a night of grudge racing but spend the night changing locations. Racers in Pennsylvania try to dodge the cops while an 11-car tournament fires up in Ohio where the winner goes home with $2,400.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: Show up or Shut Up

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Raised Wild
programme.desc: After being pushed off their land, the unique Brown family of nine travels deep in the Alaskan bush to build a small shack where they will sleep. The Browns have lived their whole lives in the wild and often go six months without seeing an outsider.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Human Wolf Pack
programme.desc: The Brown brothers are forced to step up when building a one-room cabin for the family. During some down time, the wolf pack of five goes into a small bush town to hunt for potential mates. It's the first time they've been in public together in months.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Blindsided
programme.desc: As the Browns race to finish their cabin, temperatures plummet and an illness hits the family. Their ability to survive the winter rests on the brothers as they race to get essential supplies and complete the home.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: A confrontation on the Browns property shuts down production and forces them to make a big decision.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: The Wild Life
programme.desc: After facing unparalleled obstacles, the Browns reflect on their past year of living in the Alaskan Bush while providing surprise revelations about the family's lifestyle.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Rumble in the Bush
programme.desc: Gabe is attacked by an aggressive ostrich and loses one of his most prized possessions in the process. When the ranch gets hit with the first snowfall, the family builds a big bonfire to unfreeze the ground under their house site.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Range Ridin'
programme.desc: When the ranch comes under fire from encroaching hunters, Gabe takes it upon himself to learn to ride a horse as the family constructs a fence around the property. And later, Gabe and Raquell leave the mountain for the birth of their baby girl.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bush Below Zero
programme.desc: A life-threatening cold front approaches the mountain and the family prioritizes shelters for their livestock. The task is easier said than done, as it will require the siblings to make a risky journey to a neighboring mountain to salvage lumber.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Water to Ice
programme.desc: A deep freeze halts the water supply, sending the ranch into a new crisis. And with a critical load of lumber delivered to the base of their mountain, the Wolfpack must problem solve to get their house back on track.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: A Bottle for Your Thoughts
programme.desc: Bear overnights in the wild as he absorbs life-changing news. A gentler Bam takes the lead on a critical next step of the main house build, while Noah creates a Bush Monster Plow to clear heavy snow. Sister Bird makes an unusual gift for Gabe.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: The Land Giveths and Takeths
programme.desc: As winter winds down, the Browns prepare for a medieval-themed birthday celebration for Baby Eli. Pushing through the pandemic, the Browns complete the main house just before a massive wildfire strikes the mountain.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Under Siege
programme.desc: The Raneys attempt to help the Zabec family in Virginia. With pigs destroying the homestead, predators killing livestock and a huge oak threatening their cabin, the Raneys must convince them that their free-range dream is killing their homestead.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Wolves at the Door

programme.title: Storage Wars: Melee in the Maze
programme.desc: From solid silver to a locked safe, the buyers duke it out hunting for hidden treasure in Cerritos.

programme.title: Storage Wars: War on the Shore
programme.desc: Barry Weiss finds a wondrous twelve-inch piano, which could be more than just a child's toy.

programme.title: Storage Wars: All Guns to Port
programme.desc: Surfing and cowboy items, maintenance equipment, and flare guns are found in Long Beach, California.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Senior Center Showdown
programme.desc: Darrell lands a locker filled with furniture, and Jarrod gambles on a safe in Homeland, California.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Old Spanish Standoff
programme.desc: Buyers discover a mannequin phone, a bootlegger's moonshine still, and office equipment in a California town.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Midnight in the Gardena Good and Evil
programme.desc: Two psychics 'see' inside the units at Gardena and have a 'dark' feeling about the place.

programme.title: Storage Wars: School House Lock
programme.desc: In the college town of Fullerton, California the buyers search for textbooks and rare university artifacts.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Gambler's Last Resort
programme.desc: The buyers journey eastward to the city of sin for a marathon of auctions. But with a 300-mile haul between them and their stores, the rules of the game have changed. Now on a level playing field, Jarrod fires back at the big dogs.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Young With the Gun
programme.desc: In Riverside, Jarrod and Barry are greeted by a mob of eager newbies. With their financial futures at stake, the buyers must choose to fight or befriend the crowd. Barry Weiss buys a 'mystery trunk.'

programme.title: Storage Wars: Trouble the Oil
programme.desc: The buyers dig deep in search of antiques and industrial merchandise. Jarrod and Brandi uncover what appears to be an antique wine rack. Dave Hester and Barry Weiss test each other's knowledge of oddities.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Makings of a Mogul
programme.desc: Jarrod and Barry vie for a unit filled with power tools and high-end potential. Darrell Sheets sends a message by bringing a fleet of trucks. Dave Hester reveals his trade secret to the storage auction process.

programme.title: Storage Wars: High End Heist
programme.desc: The buyers head to a high-end facility in the 'antiquers' town of Torrance, Calif., where the competition has never been stiffer. Dave and Jarrod bid on a unit with a classic Jaguar. Barry buys a locker to satisfy his adventurous spirit.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Chairman of the Hoard
programme.desc: Rumours run wild in Orange, California when six lockers, owned by one tenant, go up for auction. Dave and Darrell vie for a unit with a $12,000 payday.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Skullduggery
programme.desc: In Yucaipa, Calif., Darrell Sheets crosses the line with a stab at Dave Hester's Newport Consignment Store. Brandi and Jarrod argue over the worth of a bizarre-looking horse head. Barry Weiss bids on a locker littered with antique furniture.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Live and Let Bid
programme.desc: In the hippie-town of Encinitas, the buyers comb for '70s memorabilia. When Darrell declares this facility his 'home turf,' the other bidders are forced to fight for their claim of the treasure. Barry finds a relic from his past.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Santa Ana Street Fight
programme.desc: In Santa Ana, California, trashy looking units hold a gold mine of goods. From kayaks to golf clubs, the buyers flock to this tough town and break the bank.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Buyers on the Storm
programme.desc: Darrell bids on a locker with a 27,000-dollar payoff; Dave bids on a unit with a stockpile of antiques.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Pay the Lady
programme.desc: When auctioneer Dan Dotson calls in sick, his wife Laura will have to pull out all the stops to sell these lockers.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Hang 'Em High Desert
programme.desc: The buyers return to the high desert, where one discovers an antique toy.

programme.title: Botched: I Want My Life Back
programme.desc: A countdown of the top dozen patients whose lives were never the same after their botched surgeries. Including a patient whose modeling career ended after she had fat injected under her eyes, another who hasn’t had an intimate relationship in seven years.

programme.title: Dr. 90210: The Lift that keeps on Giving

programme.title: Nightly Pop

programme.desc: A woman chaperones her daughter's field trip and witnesses her child being kidnapped. She is soon contacted by the kidnappers and sent on an elaborate quest to help her daughter return to her safely.

programme.title: Movie: Is My Daughter Really Dead?
programme.desc: A woman's husband dies in a mysterious car accident, so she decides to make a fresh start. Her daughter makes friends with some of the kids in the neighbourhood and goes on a camping trip with them, only to also end up missing.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Devil's Playground
programme.desc: From a Nevada motel centered around clowns and haunted by a 1911 tragedy to a Maine movie theater where the horror lurks in the aisles and not on the screen, we explore scary attractions across the nation.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Cursed Towns
programme.desc: From a Vermont bridge where a jilted teenage girl leaped to her death, to a Tennessee intersection that was a the site of a deadly shoot out, we venture into towns across America haunted by the transgressions of the past.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Restless Dead
programme.desc: From a former Victorian-era asylum where victims were experimented on to a remote Nebraska outpost where a scorned woman killed her unfaithful husband, we explore the gravest of locations where the dead never sleep.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Unknown: Haunting at Versailles, Skills of War and Gold-Digging Monster
programme.desc: Don Wildman investigates a spooky encounter with the former residents of a royal palace, a teenage war hero in Nazi-occupied France and tales of enormous Himalayan mountain ants with a remarkable habit.

programme.title: Doomsday Caught on Camera: Mudslide of Mayhem and More

programme.desc: A boating trip turns terrifying when a volcano violently erupts. A helpless onlooker witnesses the raw power and destruction of a raging flash flood. An avalanche buries a family and their truck on a Colorado highway.

programme.title: Haunted Case Files: Where Evil Hides
programme.desc: A family seeks help after their daughter is physically attacked by a demonic entity, a team is surprised by the intensity of paranormal activity at a historic inn and an investigator encounters the spirit of a long-dead musician in her former home.

programme.title: Haunted Case Files: Under Attack
programme.desc: Investigators are attacked by the ghost of a sadistic nurse at an abandoned hospital, a seemingly perfect home harbors an unwelcome guest and a father-daughter team is subjected to a torrent of abuse from the spirits of former inmates.

programme.title: Haunted Case Files: Nasty Surprises
programme.desc: Things turn ugly inside a beauty salon for a veteran investigator and his team, a ghost hunter discovers a remote island is a little too alive with history and investigators unleash evil when they investigate a historic home.

programme.title: Haunted Case Files: Echoes From the Past
programme.desc: In Phoenix, AZ a mother and son ask Jay and Marie to get rid of the entity tormenting them. In an old Ohio jail, an investigator watches in horror as one of his team suffers a terrifying paranormal attack.

programme.title: Haunted Case Files: Hard Lessons
programme.desc: In Arizona, a husband and wife team are attacked by something diabolical in a hotel. Karlo takes on his hardest case and is reminded of the terrible toll paranormal activity can take.

programme.title: Haunted Case Files: Killer Spirit
programme.desc: In Indiana, father-daughter investigators come face to face with an entity known as Big Black. In Colorado, Richard has a run-in with a ghost in a home that was once the site of a double murder-suicide.

programme.title: Haunted Case Files: Haunted Asylum
programme.desc: After they investigate a cemetery, Jay and Marie are stunned when strange things start happening in their home. The Tolfs experience physical contact with the ghosts inside an old hospital in Michigan.

programme.title: Haunted Case Files: Taken Over
programme.desc: In Illinois, the Tolfs investigate the site of one of the earliest recorded possessions in the United States. Karlo is called to a lakeside property in Ohio to remove a troublesome spirit. Eric runs into a unique problem at a haunted former hospital.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Cool as a Cucumber
programme.desc: After a tumultuous night in Ibiza, Rob and Jess struggle to reconcile. Captain Sandy scrambles to avoid a catastrophic disaster after a mechanical error. A guest request sends a sleep-deprived Tom over the edge.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Bugsy prepares a naughty-themed evening for the guests. Tensions run high between Captain Sandy and Chef Tom. On a crew night out, Alex questions Bugsy about their relationship. Rob and Jess spend a romantic night in the guest cabins.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: A Real Handful
programme.desc: Tom becomes incensed over a provisioning mishap, while Malia and Bugsy struggle to manage the fallout. Rob and Alex find themselves ogled by the final charter guests of the season. Meanwhile, a group photo with Rob and Aesha sends Jess over the edge.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Never Before Scene: The Bali Is in Your Court
programme.desc: Jess confronts Aesha over the guests' group photo, while the rest of the boat races to mitigate the impending damage. Tom works to keep a lid on his frustrations, as Malia waits for the other shoe to drop. Aesha makes a decision about her future.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: A Mighty Wind
programme.desc: As the last charter comes to an end, Captain Sandy reckons with a chaotic season while the few remaining chips continue to fall. Rob and Jess struggle to reconcile after a disastrous fight, while Aesha comes to grips with the end of her yachting career.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: A Mighty Wind
programme.desc: As the last charter comes to an end, Captain Sandy reckons with a chaotic season while the few remaining chips continue to fall. Rob and Jess struggle to reconcile after a disastrous fight, while Aesha comes to grips with the end of her yachting career.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: It's Ben a Long Time
programme.desc: Colin faces a tough decision and Anastasia accepts her new role, but Sandy wonders if she's now phoning her job in. An all-female group come on board and do their best to flirt with the deck crew. Jack and Aesha move in together.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Nauti Girls Need Love Too
programme.desc: Ben's first dinner doesn’t wow the guests as much as he had hoped leaving him questioning if he still has his sea legs. Anastasia has a hard time adjusting back to her old third stew role.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Holy Ship!
programme.desc: Ben is determined to regain his sea legs, but Sirocco's faulty galley has other plans. Travis' latest drunken night has Sandy at the end of her rope. Jack ups his romance game by writing poetry for Aesha.

programme.title: How the States Got Their Shapes: White Collar vs. Blue Collar

programme.title: How the States Got Their Shapes: Red State vs. Blue State

programme.title: How the Earth Was Made
programme.desc: Explore the history of Earth, from a ball of molten rock, 4.5 billion years ago to the life sustaining marble in the sky that it is today.

programme.title: How the States Got Their Shapes: A River Runs Through It
programme.desc: A look at how water has literally shaped the state boundaries.

programme.title: How the States Got Their Shapes: Mouthing Off
programme.desc: Find out why people have different accents even though they all live in the same country.

programme.title: How the States Got Their Shapes: Culture Clash

programme.title: How the States Got Their Shapes: A Boom With a View
programme.desc: Through boom and through bust, the sweet smell of profit has drawn and redrawn our states.

programme.title: How the States Got Their Shapes: Church and States
programme.desc: Ever since the Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower, what we believe and how we believe has shaped the American map. Discuss if Utah could have possibly been bigger than Texas and learn exactly how religion shattered New England into such odd little shapes.

programme.title: How the States Got Their Shapes: Use It or Lose It
programme.desc: Discover who stole a corner of Washington DC, whether Ohio is actually a state, and why St. Louis isn't the nation's capital.

programme.title: How the States Got Their Shapes: Living on the Edge

programme.title: Jessie: The Ghostess With the Mostest

programme.title: Jessie: A Close Shave

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Pottery-A-Rooney

programme.title: NCIS: Yankee White

programme.title: NCIS: Hung Out to Dry
programme.desc: The team investigates the death of a Marine whose parachute failed to open.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Borderline
programme.desc: The NCIS team jumps into action when video surveillance footage reveals an ambush on a humvee transporting marines in the desert. Meanwhile, Nate returns from his mystery assignment.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Special Delivery
programme.desc: The NCIS team investigates the murder of a marine with top-level security clearance, after he is found dead and missing a hand in a Beverly Hills parking lot off Rodeo Drive.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Little Angels
programme.desc: Videotape revealing a Naval Commander's daughter being buried alive strikes a nerve with Special Agent Sam Hanna, and thrusts the NCIS team into a race against time to save the girl before time runs out.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Cuba Libre
programme.desc: An older man's recent release from prison is followed by the death of his wife and lawyer.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Cold Comfort
programme.desc: Detectives investigate the murder of the daughter of a recently deceased U.S. senator.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Legion
programme.desc: The detectives discover that dead and missing boys could be linked to a bike-theft ring.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: 8:30
programme.desc: Conclusion, the Intelligence Unit works to find the bombers. Even with the government agencies in the mix, Voight and his team work the case from their own angles and connections. Lindsay and Antonio question doctors who handled a transplant surgery.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: My Way
programme.desc: Commander Perry notifies the Intelligence Unit that Pulpo has been released to help track down a dangerous cartel leader. Meanwhile, Ruzek gets some difficult news as a blast from Lindsay's past comes back.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Docks
programme.desc: As Antonio's life is now in question, Voight and Platt open up about their pasts. Jin is caught while tinkering with Voight's computer and uses the only scapegoat possible to keep him in the clear.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Beautiful Friendship
programme.desc: Atwater is settling into his new gig on intelligence as Antonio is relegated to desk duty while recovering. Lindsay finally realizes she has no way out and confides in Voight for help.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Call It Macaroni
programme.desc: Jin's murder investigation moves forward and Voight is under close watch by Internal Affairs, but is still in complete command of his unit.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Get My Cigarettes
programme.desc: Intelligence begins to look into a string of murders where the victims have a dollar bill pinned to their chests. Thanks to some digging by Ruzek, Voight learns this friend was involved in some shady business dealings.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Weigh Station
programme.desc: The bounty on Halstead's head becomes a serious reality as an innocent bartender takes a bullet meant for him. Olinsky tries to reason with Bembenek to call off the hit, while Voight and his team search for the hired assassin.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Chicken, Dynamite, Chainsaw
programme.desc: Two teenage girls have gone missing, and the team knows the clock is ticking to find them. Halstead, Antonio and Lindsay investigate a tenement that gives them a much needed lead. Voight brings the father of one of the girls in to get some honest answers.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: An Honest Woman
programme.desc: While trying to help out Olive, Voight is attacked and kidnapped. When he does not show up for work, the team gets suspicious and begins investigating. Ruzek and Atwater prove they do belong on the team when they find a lead.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Prison Ball
programme.desc: The team goes undercover in a prison to gather information on the murder of a young girl.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: They'll Have to Go Through Me
programme.desc: The final part of the crossover event finds our intelligence unit joined by detectives from the SVU to help solve the pedophile case. Ruzek and Amaro, along with Halstead and Antonio continue to hunt for the link to foster care and child trafficking.

programme.title: Movie: The Maze Runner
programme.desc: A boy wakes up in an ascending elevator with no memory of who he is or how he got there. He joins a group of other boys trapped in an enclosed area surrounded by an enormous maze. His only hope for escape is by piecing together clues about his past.

programme.title: The Simpsons: From Russia Without Love
programme.desc: On a mission to play hardcore pranks, Bart, Nelson and Milhouse get Moe a mail-order bride on the Dark Web.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Werking Mom
programme.desc: Marge wants a job, and stumbles into becoming a plastic food storage container-selling drag queen. Meanwhile, Lisa tries to make the world better in the style of "Amelie."

programme.title: The Simpsons: Krusty the Clown
programme.desc: Homer finds his calling as a TV recapper, but his harsh grading causes a brawl with Krusty. After almost killing Homer, Krusty hides out at a real circus, and finds happiness there.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Daddicus Finch
programme.desc: Lisa and Homer's bond gets stronger when they start spending real quality time together, and Bart feels neglected. So Marge tries to help Homer balance his attention between the kids.

programme.title: The Simpsons: 'Tis the 30th Season

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Girl on the Bus
programme.desc: When Lisa spots a new best friend from the window of the bus, she gets a taste of what life could be like with a different, more cultured family, and proceeds to try and live a double life.

programme.title: The Simpsons: I'm Dancing as Fat as I Can
programme.desc: Homer angers Marge by binging their favourite show without her, and has to pick up a new skill in order to make amends. Meanwhile, Bart prepares to compete in 'Krusty's Holiday Trample.'

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Clown Stays in the Picture
programme.desc: Krusty reveals the untold story of his past in his movie 'The Sands of Space.' While working as personal assistants on the movie, Bart and Lisa learn about the early years of their parents' relationship.

programme.title: The Simpsons: 101 Mitigations
programme.desc: After Homer steals Comic Book Guy's car, he must either prove his innocence in court or reconcile with the jilted nerd.

programme.title: The Simpsons: I Want You (She's So Heavy)
programme.desc: When a romantic night ends in injury, Marge recovers by taking up kite boarding while Homer bonds with his hallucinated hernia. Lisa attempts to fix her parents' strained relationship by seeking advice from an unlikely source.

programme.title: The Simpsons: E My Sports

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart vs. Itchy & Scratchy
programme.desc: Krusty releases an all-female reboot of 'Itchy and Scratchy,' so Bart and his male friends decide to boycott the show. After Bart's friends turn on him for laughing at the reboot, Bart joins a group of girls who commit crimes against patriarchy.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Goes Jihad

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Family Ties
programme.desc: Troublesome dogs can cause issues within tight-knit families.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Pop Star Fallout
programme.desc: With a new baby on the way, pop star Ashlee Simpson-Wentz and "Fall Out Boy" Pete Wentz enlist Cesar's help with their aggressive dogs.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Cesar Goes to Las Vegas

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Secrets and Lies
