programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Terrible Tobi
programme.desc: Featuring a sheepdog/collie mix with an aggressive temperament.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Meow and Forever
programme.desc: Summer time is becoming busy at Pol Veterinary Services.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Paws for Concern
programme.desc: Decades of rough riding as a legendary country vet have left Doc with severe arthritis in his right ankle.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Pol-iver's Travels
programme.desc: In this enhanced show, The Incredible Dr. Pol vets pull out their best tricks to treat splits, twists, rolls, and flips – and one of the biggest rabbit Doc’s ever laid hands on!

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Boot-Scootin' Boogie
programme.desc: In this enhanced Incredible Dr. Pol, Doc glides into the clinic with a grin on his face, sporting a newly-replaced ankle and a fresh set of wheels.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Tampa: One Way or the Otter
programme.desc: Baby fever takes over ZooTampa as the penguin keepers are on egg watch.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of Babylon
programme.desc: Special access to cutting-edge archaeological investigations reveals the secrets of the long-lost city that was once the world's largest and richest. Using new evidence, experts might finally discover what Babylon looked like and what caused its downfall.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of the Black Pyramid
programme.desc: Egypt's Black Pyramid is the strange, crumbling pyramid that collapsed before its pharaoh was ever buried here, and today, it's largely unexplored. Special access to a hi-tech archaeological investigation reveals what went so catastrophically wrong.

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Lost Skyscrapers
programme.desc: A ground-breaking experiment reveals how ancient Egyptians built the giant obelisks of Thebes, and new discoveries at this holy site could explain why these mysterious marvels triggered the downfall of the pharaohs and the end of Egypt's golden age.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hunt for the Lost Cities
programme.desc: Rising out from the golden desert sands, a forgotten landscape is all that remains of a lost civilization; using cutting-edge technology, archeologist reconstruct an ancient people's greatest monuments and solve the mysteries of a city lost to time.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Holy Grail Conspiracy
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston dives into the mystery of this most-sought after relic on his quest to uncover why the resting place of Holy Grail remains hidden.

programme.title: Unearthed: Tower of Babel: The New Evidence
programme.desc: The Tower of Babel is one of the most famous stories of the Bible, and to find out if it really existed, archaeologists use cutting-edge tech and the latest science to investigate how ancient engineers could have built such an extraordinary megastructure.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of the Desert
programme.desc: The ancient city of Petra, a city carved from desert rock, has baffled experts for decades. Now, new technologies resurrect the city and reveal why the spectacular civilization was suddenly abandoned.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Holy Grail Conspiracy
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston dives into the mystery of this most-sought after relic on his quest to uncover why the resting place of Holy Grail remains hidden.

programme.title: Unearthed: Tower of Babel: The New Evidence
programme.desc: The Tower of Babel is one of the most famous stories of the Bible, and to find out if it really existed, archaeologists use cutting-edge tech and the latest science to investigate how ancient engineers could have built such an extraordinary megastructure.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost Kingdom of Kush
programme.desc: Pyramids in the deserts of Sudan are the ruins of a powerful lost civilization that rivaled the pharaohs of ancient Egypt, and using cutting-edge tech and archaeological methods, experts are revealing the secrets behind the mysterious Kingdom of Kush.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Fountain of Youth Found?
programme.desc: A strange structure shaped like a giant shark might point the way to a lost civilization's fountain of youth. A massive hurricane heads toward Florida, but something unexpected is in its eye.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Bloody Secret of the Lost City
programme.desc: A vast structure buried in the sands near the legendary city of Petra points to a bloody past. When terrorists kidnap more than 200 schoolgirls in northern Nigeria, rescuers use satellites to track them down.

programme.title: What on Earth?: North Korea Is Burning
programme.desc: Military analysts are concerned about a possible smoke screen over North Korea. Then, amateur archaeologists have discovered what could be two forgotten pyramids in Egypt via satellite image.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Secrets of the Sahara
programme.desc: In 1965, a beautiful 25 mile structure called the Eye of the Sahara was found from space. Its formation is still unknown. Then, a terrifying new weather weapon could be discovered from clouds emanating from an island in the Indian Ocean.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost Empire of the Amazon
programme.desc: New evidence could lead to the discovery of an unknown ancient civilization in the Amazon rainforest. An island disappears, and investigators are mystified. An unidentified submarine is spotted in a North Korean shipyard.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: Topics include: spaceships powered by atomic bombs, artificial rings encircling an entire star, Neil Armstrong's transmission feed cutting off when he spotted strange lights on the moon and lightning talking to itself.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Alien Death Ray
programme.desc: The Viking Lander may have found life on Mars, but we don't know anything about it.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: JFK UFO Conspiracy
programme.desc: A declassified letter written by President Kennedy demands that the CIA share its UFO data with NASA. A bizarre pattern on the surface of Mars could be a coded alien message. Investigators are shocked to find a rocket crash-landed in a crater on the Moon.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: The Moon that Disappeared
programme.desc: Recently discovered documents reveal NASA's secret plan B for failure of the first moon landing. A Soyuz capsule carrying NASA astronaut Peggy Whitson back to Earth vanishes without explanation.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Nazis on the Moon
programme.desc: A Russian probe discovers something has disturbed the lunar soil before the US or the USSR got there.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Black Knight Rises
programme.desc: Cases include: a chunk of the sun appears to have vanished, an ominous dark craft beneath the Shuttle Endeavour and Hubble spots thousands of unidentified objects traveling faster than light.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Secret Aliens
programme.desc: An astronomer records an unusual radio signal from beyond our solar system. FBI agents find classified documents at the home of a NASA scientist. When scientists discover strange DNA in the octopus, they examine if their origins could be alien.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Pluto's Evil Twin
programme.desc: After NASA's New Horizons spacecraft flies by Pluto, it encounters a strange alien world that shuts down the probe's computers, and experts investigate if this mysterious object is an alien spacecraft hiding at the edge of our solar system.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: My Name is Denise
programme.desc: In North Port, Florida, police receive a call that a young mother has gone missing from her home. In an effort to find her, detectives follow a trail of incoming 911 calls that reveal a heartbreaking story more horrific than they could have ever imagined.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Stolen Memories
programme.desc: Leaving behind Scranton, Pennsylvania, a woman and her family head for the white sands of Florida to start a new life. When one of them disappears, their dream becomes a nightmare they must live over, and over again.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: John Doe 57
programme.desc: When a tip from a missing person’s network helps identify the body of a John Doe murder victim, investigators question the victim's family and friends to find the killer, and ultimately unravel a dark tale of betrayal.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Enter Frame Left
programme.desc: When a young woman in Overland Park, Kansas disappears after a visit to the mall, investigators examine store surveillance footage and uncover a shocking abduction. Days later, the missing woman is found dead in the woods, exposing a horrific tragedy.

programme.title: The Missing: Off the Face of the Earth
programme.desc: 13-year-old Tabitha Tudors walks to her bus stop, but one day she doesn't come home. She never made it on the bus and police can't find her. And then 16-year-old Shemika Cosey vanishes while at a sleepover.

programme.title: The Missing: Missing Mothers
programme.desc: Prisma Reyes vanishes from a parking garage after footage shows her getting on an elevator, but is never seen again. And then Andrea Knabel disappears during the middle of the night.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: My Mother's Sins: Diane Downs
programme.desc: A mother's infatuation with a married man who said he had no interest in being a father to anyone's children was the possible motive behind the crimes of Diane Downs, who shot her three young children in her car, seriously injuring two and killing one.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: My Mother's Sins: Diane Downs

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: My Name is Denise
programme.desc: In North Port, Florida, police receive a call that a young mother has gone missing from her home. In an effort to find her, detectives follow a trail of incoming 911 calls that reveal a heartbreaking story more horrific than they could have ever imagined.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: The Devil's Ranch
programme.desc: A college student goes missing on Spring Break, and authorities work around the clock to locate him. When a man runs a drug checkpoint, the investigation takes a grisly turn into a world of drug smuggling, the occult, and human sacrifice.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Hate and Fury
programme.desc: When three synagogues simultaneously go up in flames, federal agents work around the clock to solve the arsons. They get an unexpected break when a double murder 150 miles away reveals new evidence - and a sinister plot of bigotry, fire and fury.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Who Killed Miss Brown Sugar
programme.desc: When 21-year-old Erica Vassell disappears after a Super Bowl party in Clewiston, Florida, the town launches an immediate search. But when her brutally murdered body is discovered days later, everyone in the tiny glades town is left in shock and fear.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Devil Wears Sneakers
programme.desc: A tight-knit Illinois farming town is rocked when a family of five is found beaten to death in their home. When the bodies of the Gee family are discovered, the tiny town of Beason, IL finds itself in the midst of a gruesome murder mystery.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: End of Watch
programme.desc: The town of Cleveland, OK experiences overwhelming heartbreak when its esteemed Sheriff is mysteriously gunned down in the night. As the community wrestles with its safety, law enforcement is determined to find justice for their fellow officer.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Dangers of Success
programme.desc: As a prominent family awakens to noises in the night, their worst nightmare ensues when their beloved daughter Terri Ann McCoy is fatally shot. Investigators work through leads and lies to discover the perpetrators were closer than they realized.

programme.title: Broken Trust: Gold, Guns and God
programme.desc: Allen Keith isn't your typical small-town preacher. He also runs a pawn shop, frequented by gold buyers, gun dealers, and fellow pastors. But the pawnshop turns out to be a far cry from the pulpit, and before long and a stone-cold killer is on the loose.

programme.title: Broken Trust: Collateral Damage
programme.desc: When the pillar of a remote Utah community is approached by an old acquaintance with a plan to make money, an exciting partnership is formed. But as their venture falls apart, access to a valuable cache of weapons, becomes a motive for betrayal.

programme.title: Broken Trust: In-Law, Outlaw
programme.desc: A California real estate agent gives in to his wife's wish that her mother moves in with the couple, and their kids. But what begins as a compassionate gesture turns into a bitter war of wills between husband, wife and mother-in-law leading to bloodshed.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Secret Nightmare
programme.desc: Tiffany Shore grew up knowing that her father was evil, but she still kept his secrets. When Tiffany finally escapes him, she is devastated to discover that has committed far more heinous acts than she ever imagined or knew about.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Something Wasn't Right
programme.desc: Beverly Stephens knew something wasn't right with her husband, Reginald Brooks, but never thought there was a killer inside him.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: You Know My Brother's Name
programme.desc: When Karen Kuzma was a little girl, she adored her older brother. As they grew older, she saw changes in him that she didn't understand, but it never occurred to her that he was becoming the most infamous serial killer in American history.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Was a Good Man to Me
programme.desc: When Alvin "Bud" Brown was arrested he told an officer that he was just like Hannibal Lecter. But, to his wife, Jackie, the man she shared a bed with for years appeared to be gentle and loving until the Thanksgiving Day when she discovered the truth.

programme.title: Waco
programme.desc: A look at the April 19, 1993 FBI raid of a religious compound in Waco, Texas that left seventy-six members of a small, obscure religious cult dead, including twenty-six children.

programme.title: Manson
programme.desc: Relive the horrific Tate/ LaBianca murders, and the media circus surrounding the trials of cult leader Charles Manson and his "Family" of misfit killers. Archival news reports, photos, and interviews paint a searing portrait of 1960s Los Angeles.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Headquarters
programme.desc: In this episode, Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil, to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich
programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Hitler and the Aryan Myth
programme.desc: A laughable pseudo-history dreamt up by occult fantasists lay behind the myth of the Aryan super race. Yet it inspired the Nazis into war, legitimized the holocaust and led to the abduction of tens of thousands of young Aryan-looking children.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases: Guernsey
programme.desc: New discoveries on a strange fortified island reveal the terrifying truth behind Hitler's secret plan to win WWII at all costs.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood-soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, General Robert E. Lee brings his Army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, Federal forces clash with a massive rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Movies That Shaped America's Myth
programme.desc: Celebrating the icons and legends of the American West as immortalized by Hollywood. From the great stars like Clint Eastwood, John Wayne, and Steve McQueen, to the great directors like John Ford, Sergio Leone, and Sam Peckinpah.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Hollywood vs. History
programme.desc: The story of the Old West as it was and as it was portrayed by the giants of cinema. Legendary lawmen like Wyatt Earp and 'Wild Bill' Hickok, infamous outlaws like Jesse James and Billy the Kid, and epic showdowns like the Gunfight at the OK Corral.

programme.title: M.A.D. WORLD: Peace and War
programme.desc: By the mid 1970s, the Cold War has remained a fact of life for decades. But 30 years into the war, and the doctrine of mutually assured destruction doesn't feel like a roadmap to peace. It's an arms race, a propaganda and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: M.A.D. WORLD: Cold War II
programme.desc: By the end of the 70s, war between East and West has been raging for decades. Countless proxy wars have proven how destructive this so-called Cold War can be. It's an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times a deadly game.

programme.title: M.A.D. WORLD: Warmonger
programme.desc: In the early 1980's the next battlefield in the struggle between communism and democracy, emerges, and it's in the United States’ own backyard. It's an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times a deadly game. This is the Cold War.

programme.title: Building Alaska: We're Back
programme.desc: Extreme building is back in Alaska. Three men risk it all to build a remote hunting cabin, an off the grid bear lodge and an island retreat.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Bear Attack
programme.desc: Creig's camp is stunned after a bear attack, high winds wreak havoc and cause delays at Tom's build and Rich goes underwater to save his dock.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Independence Day
programme.desc: Rich and his team race to stay ahead of the helicopter drops. It is unclear whether a new builder on Tom's site a friend or foe. And an eight point earthquake leaves Creig's build on shaky ground.

programme.title: Building Alaska: It's Getting Awkward
programme.desc: Rich's build is down to two workers which will make it tough to reach their milestones, nothing but wall-to-wall trouble may cause Tom's build to come tumbling down and Creig's build is fraught with costly miscalculations and tensions with Jim.

programme.title: Building Alaska: No Quit
programme.desc: While gale-force winds create danger for Tom's team, and rainy conditions threaten Creig's build, Sitka is nothing but sunny which provides the perfect conditions for Rich to have a whale of a good time.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Crunch Time
programme.desc: Impending weather is making crunch time at the builds that much more desperate. Rich is forced to make a crucial building decision. Tom risks stranding his workers. Creig battles freezing temperatures.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: We're in Business
programme.desc: Mike and MJ decide to go into business together to buy houses and renovate them right. But MJ is in for a surprise when he discovers Mike has already purchased their first project, then finds another potential investment 3.5 hours away.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Water: The Good, the Bad and the Money
programme.desc: MJ and Mike get a good deal on a St. Lawrence River eyesore in the Thousand Islands but inherit a house full of asbestos and are forced to call in a remediation team.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: What Comes Down Must Go Up
programme.desc: Facing major structural and water issues at the river house, Mike and MJ decide to take the whole house down so they can build it back up right. This is a major setback, and their profit will take a big hit unless they identify some areas to save.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Debates, Decisions, Designer
programme.desc: The leaching bed is replaced at the country house, and work progresses until Mike and MJ find out an open permit remains on the barn. Later, the big day finally arrives when MJ and Lisa get married in a picturesque setting, as long as the rain holds off.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Decadent Desserts
programme.desc: Casey's sojourn of sustenance has had no shortage of sweets, and now it's time to celebrate the best of the best. We're counting down the most decadent desserts in Man vs. Food history and inducting them into our Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Best BBQ
programme.desc: Casey's quest for America's best bites has taken him from coast to coast, and it's about time we started celebrating the cream of the crop. Fire up the grill, because this time we’re inducting the Best BBQ in the history of Man V. Food.

programme.title: Good Eats: Cuckoo for Coq Au Vin
programme.desc: Chef Brown demystifies Coq au Vin.

programme.title: Good Eats: Do the Rice Thing
programme.desc: Alton Brown marvels at the mysteries of different rice varieties.

programme.title: Good Eats: Field of Greens
programme.desc: Chef/Scientist Alton Brown turns leafy greens from fiend into friend.

programme.title: Good Eats: Sprung a Leek
programme.desc: Alton ponders the leek, the lesser-known member of the Alllium family.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Warsaw
programme.desc: In Poland's capital city of Warsaw, the Slavic culture is rich and the hearty food sticks with you through the winter. From pierogi to zapiekanka to paczki, Andrew Zimmern explores the iconic eats that Poles hold as tradition.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dublin
programme.desc: In a city celebrated for its beloved beverages, Dublin, Ireland's, food does not disappoint. Andrew Zimmern examines edible Irish icons from smoked salmon, soda bread and stew to boxty, black pudding and, of course, Guinness.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Louisville, Ky
programme.desc: Andrew travels to Louisville, KY, which boasts one of the most eclectic food scenes in the country. He digs in to Southern favorites with an Asian twist, fried chicken served with a fiery sauce and comfort food for the modern era.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Birmingham
programme.desc: Andrew travels to Birmingham, Alabama, home to one of the fastest growing food scenes in America. From the state's signature barbecue to innovative takes on Southern cuisine, he gets a taste of what makes the Magic City so unique.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: El Paso
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern is in El Paso, where Texas meets Mexico on the border as well as in the kitchen. The city is filled to the brim of its 10-gallon hat with Tex-Mex cuisine as well as Mexican classics.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Antigua Guatemala
programme.desc: Andrew checks out the vibrant and flavorful fusions of Antigua Guatemala. This locale is home to sacred food traditions and cultural mashups of Mayan and Spanish heritage. His adventure includes colorful enchiladas, tiny tamales and traditional sweets.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: frankfurt
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Frankfurt where he samples everything from the classic frankfurter and apple wine to pork shoulder with sauerkraut and hand cheese with music.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cartagena
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern shows off the tempting flavors of Cartagena, Colombia. From fried fish and sizzling egg arepas to bedroom-boosting fruits and seafood stews, the taste of the coast infuses every bite.

programme.desc: Dave plays a crack addict who visits an elementary school to give an anti-drug speech.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: True Hollywood Stories: Prince and Red Balls Energy Drink
programme.desc: Paul Mooney answers life's biggest questions; Prince hits the basketball court; musical guest Cee-Lo.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Tyron's Biggum's Intervention and Racist Hollywood Animals
programme.desc: Dave uncovers racist Hollywood animals and Tyron Biggums returns for an intervention.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Wayne Brady and Tyrone Biggums's Fear Factor
programme.desc: Crackhead Tyrone Biggums returns as a guest on Fear Factor; special guests Joe Rogan, Nick Cannon, and Wayne Brady.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: The Love Contract and True Hollywood Stories: Rick James
programme.desc: Dave introduces The Love Contract and True Hollywood Stories featuring Rick James.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Here Comes the Bribe
programme.desc: Donna drags Cleveland to marriage counseling after he botches their wedding vows renewal, but the counselor makes it clear that Cleveland can swing the 'treatments' in his favour - for a price.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Brownsized
programme.desc: Cleveland takes an offer from his boss, Mr. Waterman, to quit his job with six months of severance pay, but struggles to find a way to tell Donna. Meanwhile, Rallo finds a handsome and charming man for Roberta.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: The Hangover Part Tubbs
programme.desc: When Donna runs for the school board, she tries to keep an embarrassing Cleveland out of her campaign. But her efforts blow up in her face when he 'kills' a new friend playing 'The Hurt Locker' game.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Fist and the Furious
programme.desc: Cleveland feels bad for Dr. Fist because he has no friends, so he decides to make him 'one of the guys.'

programme.title: Martin: I, Martin, Take Thee Pam?
programme.desc: Martin discovers that his marriage is invalid and that he's actually married to Pam.

programme.title: Martin: Power to the People's Court
programme.desc: After Tommy accidentally backs into Sheneneh's car, she serves him with a court summons.

programme.title: Martin: Auction
programme.desc: Martin gives his cuckoo clock to Pam who donates it to a charity auction.

programme.title: Martin: Daddy Dearest
programme.desc: Tommy's father visits and wants to make him into a man.

programme.title: Martin: One Flew Over the Hoochie's Nest
programme.desc: Pam's twin cousin escapes from a mental ward and visits, driving her crazy.

programme.title: Martin: Goin' for Mine
programme.desc: Pam concocts a plan to get a job at Martin's old friend's recording company.

programme.title: Martin: Stake-Out
programme.desc: After the police ask Pam if they can use her apartment for a stake-out, Martin decides to catch the criminal himself so he can earn the $100,000 reward.

programme.title: Martin: California, Here We Come
programme.desc: Martin is courted by television executives to host a national talk show based in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: What's Will Got to Do With It?
programme.desc: Will starts wheeling and dealing as Ashley's manager until she develops an enormous ego.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Reality Bites
programme.desc: Will gets into a brawl with Dougie the Whale in front of a group of young children.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Grumpy Young Men
programme.desc: Will and Carlton get into a fight over a girl, but in the end their friendship prevails.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Fresh Prince, the Movie
programme.desc: When Will witnesses a murder, he and his family are put in the witness protection program.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Will's Misery
programme.desc: Will gets caught up in a sorority prank that is meant to teach him to respect women.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Father Knows Best
programme.desc: Ashley realizes that there is more to life than the controlled environment she lives in.

programme.title: Movie: Blue Streak
programme.desc: A jewel thief is released from jail and sets out to find his hidden loot. However, when he returns to his hiding spot he finds the area has been turned into a police station and his only shot of recovering the diamonds is to impersonate a detective.

programme.title: Movie: New Jack City
programme.desc: A New York City detective hires maverick ex-cops to bring down a Napoleonic drug lord.

programme.title: Movie: ATL
programme.desc: Friends face different challenges as they prepare for life after high school.

programme.title: Movie: The Color of Rain
programme.desc: When Gina loses her husband on Christmas Day, she soon finds a kindred spirit in Michael, another widowed parent whom she meets through her kids' school.

programme.title: Movie: Love on a Limb
programme.desc: A woman takes it up herself to try and save a beloved oak tree after the mayor hires a handsome landscaper to cut it down. She chains herself to it and as the landscaper attempts to wait her out, the tree brings them more than they could have imagined.

programme.title: Movie: My Best Friend's Bouquet
programme.desc: A woman accidentally catches a wedding bouquet before her engaged friend. She is then reminded of a family myth that puts her friend’s happiness at stake.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Truth Will Out
programme.desc: Rose is apprehensive about a visit from her daughter and granddaughter, since their reason for coming is to settle Rose's late-husband's will. Meanwhile, Blanche gets caught up in the tabloids of a society murder.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Nice and Easy
programme.desc: Blanche's visiting niece is a chip right off the old block when she dates a different man all night every night. Dorothy does battle with a mouse living in the house.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Operation
programme.desc: Dorothy is hesitant about having foot surgery just as she was scheduled to tap dance with Blanche and Rose at a dance recital.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Second Motherhood
programme.desc: Blanche is romanced by a wealthy suitor who she learns has several small children. This fact dampens his proposal of marriage. Meanwhile, Dorothy and Rose go to bat with the bathroom plumbing.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Adult Education
programme.desc: Blanche's psychology professor sexually harasses her when she goes to him for help on a difficult test. Blanche's professor makes her a harassing deal: If she has sex with him, he'll give her an 'A' for the exam.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Job Hunting
programme.desc: When Rose loses her job at the grief center, she begins searching for other sources of work. Meanwhile, Blanche tries to lose a few pounds and Dorothy is excited when a man she once had a crush on asks her out.

programme.title: Frasier: Big Crane on Campus
programme.desc: Frasier bumps into a former classmate and campus queen with an unglamourous personality.

programme.title: Frasier: Out With Dad
programme.desc: Frasier gets Martin to go to the opera with him on Valentine's Day rather than going stag.

programme.title: Frasier: Something About Dr. Mary
programme.desc: Frasier's temporary replacement for Roz takes over the talk show as Frasier's co-host.

programme.title: Frasier: Whine Club
programme.desc: Frasier hosts an informal brunch in order to acquaint himself with Niles' new lady love.

programme.title: Frasier: Hot Pursuit
programme.desc: Frasier and Roz head for a broadcasting convention that's a haven for lusty partygoers.

programme.title: Frasier: Morning Becomes Entertainment
programme.desc: When Frasier's show is off the air for negotiations, he hosts a television talk show.

programme.title: Frasier: To Thine Old Self Be True
programme.desc: Frasier gets caught in a compromising position with a chatty stripper at Donny's party.

programme.title: Frasier: Three Faces of Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier is flattered to be featured as a celebrity caricature, until he sees the result.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Publicity Agent
programme.desc: Lucy represents herself to reporters as an exotic princess.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Gets Ricky on the Radio
programme.desc: Lucy is so impressed at Ricky's correct answers to a radio quiz show that she gets him on the show as a contestant.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy's Schedule
programme.desc: When Lucy is late for a dinner engagement, Ricky works out a time schedule.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Ricky Thinks He's Getting Bald
programme.desc: Haunted by the thought that he is growing bald, Ricky appeals to Lucy for a remedy.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blind Ambitions
programme.desc: Rose's sister, Lily, can't accept the fact that now that she's blind, she needs help.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Big Daddy
programme.desc: Blanche's father, Big Daddy, comes to Miami for a visit, with an announcement; he's sold the family plantation and is setting out to become a country singer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Way We Met
programme.desc: One night after watching 'Psycho', the girls find it hard to sleep so they stay up and reminisce about how they all came to live with one another.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: End of the Curse
programme.desc: Blanche is mortified after taking a pregnancy test which indicates she's pregnant. Then after visiting her doctor, she learns the truth, she's beginning menopause.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ladies of the Evening
programme.desc: The house is fumigated and the girls move into a Miami Beach hotel. Previously, Blanche had won three tickets to see the opening of Burt Reynolds new movie and passes to the party held afterwards where they could meet him.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Take Him, He's Mine
programme.desc: Dorothy dumps a depressed Stan on Blanche so that she can go out with a naval officer.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actors Ian Ziering and Joe Pantoliano join the show. Then, pastry chef Jane Soudah stops by.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Oscar-winning actress Julie Andrews and daughter Emma Walton Hamilton, and TV host Phil Keoghan join the show.

programme.title: Movie: Stranded in Paradise
programme.desc: When a HR exec loses her job, she travels to Puerto Rico for a business conference. But as the trip becomes a disaster and a hurricane shuts down the whole island, she meets a handsome traveler who gives her a new perspective.

programme.title: Movie: Love Under the Olive Tree
programme.desc: The prize of Sunset Valley's annual olive oil contest is a land parcel with disputed ownership. Two people face-off to get it, and sparks fly.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: The Platform
programme.desc: When it appears one of their own shot an unarmed man on a busy Boston subway platform, the team must fight to find the real killer while clearing their detective's name. It becomes clear that the circumstances surrounding the shooting are not clear.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Bassholes
programme.desc: Jane and Maura find themselves submerged in the cutthroat, high-stakes world of competitive bass fishing when a tournament-leading fisherman is killed. At the same time, Frankie is paying the price after losing a bet.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Imitation Game
programme.desc: The murder of a notorious thief sends Jane and Maura into the world of art heists and forgery, and forces Jane to tango with an FBI agent who has a keen interest in her case. There's also a new man in Angela's life.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Misconduct Game
programme.desc: The murder of a crime tech sends shockwaves throughout the team. When suspicions arise that the tech had tampered with evidence for BPD cases, Maura is suspended from her position. Jane is determined to catch the killer and clear the department.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Deadly Harvest
programme.desc: Jane and Maura are called out to the BCU 'body farm' (an academic research facility dedicated to the study of human decomposition) when a murder victim is found buried in a shallow grave among the research corpses.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Face Value
programme.desc: The good news is we have a witness to a murder. The bad news is he suffers from Prosopagnosia, commonly known as facial recognition blindness, and he can't recognize the killer. The Rizzolis prepare for a visit from their scheming cousin, Carlo.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: A Bad Seed Grows
programme.desc: When a 16-year-old girl is murdered and left in a cage, Jane and Maura must overcome the ethical dilemma of a psychiatrist and the stiff opposition of a fussy prosecutor to find the killer. Meanwhile, Jane has couch issues and Frankie sees UFOs.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Misconduct Game
programme.desc: The murder of a crime tech sends shockwaves throughout the team. When suspicions arise that the tech had tampered with evidence for BPD cases, Maura is suspended from her position. Jane is determined to catch the killer and clear the department.

programme.desc: Jane and Maura are called out to the BCU 'body farm' (an academic research facility dedicated to the study of human decomposition) when a murder victim is found buried in a shallow grave among the research corpses.

programme.title: Life Today With James and Betty Robison
programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: Live Life Forward: The Miracle of Give Kids The World
programme.desc: Give Kids the World and its community of corporate sponsors unite, creating an unforgettable experience for critically ill wish children and their families.

programme.title: The Closer: Speed Bump
programme.desc: The team must figure out if a hit-and-run on a recently released criminal is a murder.

programme.title: The Closer: Cherry Bomb
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl is found dead and questions lead to the son of an L.A. County Sheriff. As Johnson investigates, she learns that the son may be hiding behind his father's badge and may have done so before.

programme.title: The Closer: Live Wire
programme.desc: When a reporter alerts Brenda to a crime scene, Priority Homicide and the FBI fight for jurisdiction over the case. Meanwhile, interpersonal relationships on the squad force Brenda into a corner.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Nice to Meet You, Dr. Isles
programme.desc: When the jeweler to Boston's super cool and famous dies, our investigation leads us to a member of the Isles family we've never met. And that leads us to a secret Maura has been keeping for almost all of her life.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Love Taps
programme.desc: The murder of a college student takes an odd turn when Jane and Maura discover he had 32 girlfriends. Uncovering who killed him and why leads them into a world of app developers, virtual boyfriends, and relationships built on lies.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Sister Sister
programme.desc: When a dog trainer is found dead at home, her champion Rottweiler is the prime suspect.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Fuentes/ Lawson
programme.desc: A pampered female detective who firmly believes anything a man can do a woman can do just as well swaps lives with an obedient, stay-at-home wife and mom who believes her role in life is to fulfill her husband's every command and take care of her family.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Slater/ Williams
programme.desc: A dance-obsessed housewife who maps out every minute of her day and pushes her kids in ballroom dancing competitions swaps with a mother of three who lets her kids eat whatever and whenever and runs her house like the wild, wild West.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Rowland and Rivera
programme.desc: Meet Robin Roland, a freewheeling motorcycle-riding mother of three carefree teenaged girls from Illinois. The Roland girls swap places with the children of a New Jersey mom named Grace Rivera, who rules over her two daughters with an iron fist.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A high school student vanishes without a trace. False leads force detectives to work double time until a prostitute's murder demands police attention and the possibility arises that the same killer may have struck twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skeleton Key
programme.desc: Police think an abusive ex-boyfriend is to blame for a young woman's disappearance, but a set of keys discovered in her vehicle don't match up with either the ex-boyfriend or the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In the Bag
programme.desc: A little boy is found alone and in a panic. When police go to his home, they find his grandparents dead in their bedroom.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Yes, in Deed
programme.desc: Following a terrible fire in a mobile home, the medical examiner makes a startling discovery which sets off a dramatic turn of events.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Guarded Secrets
programme.desc: A security guard disappears from work without a trace, and investigators can't determine if he left willingly or if foul play was involved.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoking Out a Killer
programme.desc: Three college students are killed walking along a footpath over the course of six years. Police know they're dealing with a serial killer, but the hard part is catching him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pet Rock
programme.desc: 'The Denise O'Neill Case' - a quiet waitress vanishes without a trace. Police suspect a case of a date gone horribly wrong. However, when her body is discovered, it comes wrapped in a mountain of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Best Foot Forward
programme.desc: A young woman goes missing, but will anyone notice? A business tycoon caught in a scandal he works over-time not to expose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purebread Murder
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered after years of domestic abuse. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit. But the evidence which will conclusively tie the killer to the crime is on a freshly baked hamburger bun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Threatening emails, a missing person and an abandoned truck lead police to a home where they believe a murder was committed. The evidence is overwhelming and investigators are sure they have the killer. What they don't have is the body of the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Fog
programme.desc: Investigators set out to determine if the dense, thick fog that caused the deadliest automobile accident on American history was a natural phenomenon, or the result of something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sex, Lies and DNA
programme.desc: While Earl Morris was vacationing in California, he learned his wife had gone missing from their home in Arizona. The search for Ruby Morris involved dozens of investigators and scientists, even the coast guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Trace
programme.desc: The deaths of a child and a truck driver in the same hospital on the same day are investigated to see if there is a link between them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Knot for Everyone
programme.desc: In the mid-1980s, bodies of nude woman were found in remote hills of California. The police got a break when a known prostitute escaped an attacker and was able to identify him and his automobile. The suspect was 50-year-old Roger Kibbe.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hundreds of Reasons
programme.desc: A well-liked assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse in murdered while he closes his restaurant for the night.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from her late-night job at a Florida convenience store. After she is found raped and strangled, investigators know the only way to pin down her killer will be through DNA analysis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: 'The Tracey Frame Case' - after a passer-by spots a wild fire in a secluded parking lot, police discover a dreadful homicide. It takes days to identify the victim, and most of the evidence is lost when firefighters extinguish the blaze.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: "The Dr. Brian Stidham Case" A prominent Arizona surgeon is found stabbed to death outside his office. All signs point to a random attack until investigators uncover an unlikely suspect with deep pockets, and an even deeper hatred for the good doctor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gone Ballistic
programme.desc: When a middle-aged man is gunned down in his own home, the motive appears to be robbery, but a mysterious greeting card blows the investigation wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A high school student vanishes without a trace. False leads force detectives to work double time until a prostitute's murder demands police attention and the possibility arises that the same killer may have struck twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skeleton Key
programme.desc: Police think an abusive ex-boyfriend is to blame for a young woman's disappearance, but a set of keys discovered in her vehicle don't match up with either the ex-boyfriend or the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In the Bag
programme.desc: A little boy is found alone and in a panic. When police go to his home, they find his grandparents dead in their bedroom.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Yes, in Deed
programme.desc: Following a terrible fire in a mobile home, the medical examiner makes a startling discovery which sets off a dramatic turn of events.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Guarded Secrets
programme.desc: A security guard disappears from work without a trace, and investigators can't determine if he left willingly or if foul play was involved.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoking Out a Killer
programme.desc: Three college students are killed walking along a footpath over the course of six years. Police know they're dealing with a serial killer, but the hard part is catching him.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: The Enemy Within
programme.desc: An young father allegedly murders his parents in a haze of rage and drug-addiction then abandons his child and flees to the American South.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: The Enemy Next Door
programme.desc: Kevin Patrick Stoeser is caught looking at lewd pictures in a halfway house following his release. Knowing this will put him back behind bars, he flees and has been on the run ever since.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: A woman is found beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped outside of Phoenix. The nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer than any other single piece of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Southside Strangler
programme.desc: Learn how investigators caught Timothy Wilson Spencer, better known as the Southside Strangler, a serial killer responsible for the murders of five women in Virginia. This was the first use of DNA profiling in the U.S. justice system.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Trapped
programme.desc: An isolated road becomes a death trap when a medical emergency strikes a secluded homestead. The Raneys face their first ever failed rescue.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Drowning
programme.desc: The Raneys must save two Hawaiian homesteaders who built their dream homestead in the path of life-threatening flash floods. As the weather closes in, the Raneys must battle to save a homestead from drowning and also win the trust of the homesteaders.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Deconstructed: Living on the Edge
programme.desc: With extra facts and bonus scenes: The Raney family kicks off the most ambitious rescue ever, on their own 40 acres. As multiple generations gather to help, Marty attempts a dangerous river crossing to get thousands of pounds of gear to the homestead.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: One If by River, Two If by Air
programme.desc: An aerial supply mission faces turbulent skies as Marty breaks ground on massive foundation posts for his cabin. Misty and Maciah begin an innovative greenhouse that requires lumber, but Matt and Katie must first troubleshoot the new sawmill.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Passive River House
programme.desc: A pro builder constructs an off-grid dream home for his family on a remote riverside plot of land in the heart of Canada's east coast. He faces tropical storms, winter blizzards and more all while using innovative methods to meet passive house standards.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Threat of Fire
programme.desc: The Browns push through the pandemic, even planning Baby Eli's birthday celebration, when a massive wildfire strikes. When everything they've built is threatened, they must quickly rescue as many animals as possible.

programme.title: I Quit: Winner Takes All
programme.desc: While all of the businesses faced challenges, three of them have impressed the mentors with their perseverance and passion. The entrepreneurs are invited to New York for one more mentoring session, unaware that one of them will walk away with $100,000.

programme.title: Expedition X: Cambodia's Jungle Monster
programme.desc: The surge of human activity surrounding the discovery of an ancient city sends Phil Torres and Jessica Chobot deep in the Cambodian jungle to search for a monster that has been terrifying locals for centuries.

programme.title: Expedition X: Mothman Phenomenon
programme.desc: Jessica Chobot and Phil Torres dive into the legend of Mothman by searching for clues in a long-sealed bunker and a top-secret Air Force base.

programme.title: Expedition X: Terror on Doll Island
programme.desc: Phil Torres and Jessica Chobot power through camera malfunctions and emotional breakdowns in order to find an explanation of what is happening on the Island of the Dolls, a dangerous place that locals have long avoided.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Lost Mexican City
programme.desc: Josh Gates searches Mexico for clues behind the mysterious rise and disappearance of Teotihuacan, a powerful civilization that predated the Aztecs in Mesoamerica.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Incan King's Mummy
programme.desc: Josh Gates ventures into the mysterious cloud forests of Ecuador's remote central highlands in search of the all-powerful mummy of the last Inca king, Atahualpa.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Lost Spanish Fortune, Found!
programme.desc: Josh travels the coast of Florida and to the newly opened country of Cuba in search of sunken treasure from a fleet of Spanish ships sunk in 1715. The hunt takes him deep into the Atlantic and into the previously sealed National Archives of Cuba.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Plummer's Gold
programme.desc: Josh sets off for gold rush country to search for the lost fortune of a notorious Montana sheriff. During his investigation, Josh explores hidden cave systems and blows open a mine that's been sealed for over a century.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Lost Tomb of Attila the Hun
programme.desc: Josh travels to Hungary to join three separate archeological teams looking for the lost tomb of Attila the Hun. Legends and ancient texts lead the search from the bottom of the Danube to the mountain forests just outside of Budapest.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Vanished Empire
programme.desc: On the Mediterranean island of Crete, the Minoans built one of the most glorious civilizations in the ancient world and then mysteriously vanished. Josh Gates travels to Greece to find out exactly how Europe's first superpower disappeared.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Lost Colony of Roanoke
programme.desc: Josh joins leading archeologists as they investigate America's first missing-persons case, the lost colony of Roanoke. Following newly discovered clues, he'll reach new heights as he digs for answers to this over 400-year-old mystery.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Cloning the Woolly Mammoth
programme.desc: To help clone the extinct woolly mammoth back to life, Josh Gates visits the Korean biotech lab driving the project and excavates ancient bones in a working Canadian gold mine. He then descends into a vast sinkhole in Siberia to unearth frozen DNA.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Readings and Renovations

programme.desc: Blackbelt isn't the only Ninja Master in his family, his Grandma Ninja has awesome moves too, but when she gets a nasty cold, Blaze, AJ, and Blackbelt set out to make the most powerful medicine there is: Ninja Soup!

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save the Squirrels/ Pups Save a Roo
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol is on a roll when squirrels stash acorns in Alex's treehouse causing it to fall onto Daring Danny's skateboard. It's a switcheroo situation when a joey is separated from its mama. It's up to the pups to save a Roo and the day.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Waiter-Bot/Pups Stop a Pie-Clone
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger creates a cyclone of delicious pies! The pups must stop it before the town is covered.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sanctuary! / What's Eating Patrick?
programme.desc: When stray snails start appearing around Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob decides to care for them himself. To defend Bikini Bottom's honor, Patrick enters a Krabby Patty eating competition.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob LongPants/ Larry's Gym
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets a pair of long pants, but they change his life in unexpected ways.When Larry the Lobster opens a new gym in Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob becomes his best customer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patnocchio/ ChefBob
programme.desc: Plankton tells Patrick he's his conscience so he can convince him to steal him a Krabby Patty. SpongeBob gets stage fright and has to invent a new persona.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sandy's Nutmare/ Bulletin Board
programme.desc: Sandy creates the latest acorn-based food sensation, but her tree pays the price for her greed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Swamp Mates/ One Trick Sponge
programme.desc: Bubble Bass gets stranded with Patrick in a swamp looking for a lost action figure.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Incredible Shrinking Sponge/ Sportz?
programme.desc: SpongeBob must figure out how to do his job after accidentally shrinking himself. Squidward invents a new sport to get back at SpongeBob and Patrick for annoying him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Good Krabby Name/ Move It or Lose It
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick advertise the Krusty Krab. Then, petitions are circulated to see which restaurant will get bulldozed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spy Buddies/ Boat Smarts/ Good 'Ol What's-His-Name
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick spy on Plankton; SpongeBob makes an instructional boating video.

programme.title: Deadline to Disaster: Horror in the Heartland
programme.desc: July 19th, 2018 a tornado outbreak erupts over central Iowa. Twin tornadoes bear down on a small town just northeast of Des Moines. While one tears through open fields destroying small farms, the second damages homes in a local neighborhood.

programme.title: Deadline to Disaster: Surviving Katrina's Surge
programme.desc: August 2005, Hurricane Katrina's massive 27 foot storm surge batters the Mississippi coastline obliterating beachfront property. In Waveland, a father and son forced to flee their home by boat, find themselves rescuing neighbors from the storm surge.

programme.title: Deadline to Disaster: Holiday Hell
programme.desc: It's the day after Christmas 2015 and 13 tornadoes hit the Dallas, Texas area. Just after dark, the strongest an EF4, rages through Garland and Rowlett tossing cars from an overpass.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter: Deadliest Mudslide

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter: Twin Twisters

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter: Texas Flash Flood
programme.desc: A flash flood in the Texas Hill Country kills 13 people and destroys 350 homes. A father watches helplessly as his house is pulled down the river, and his wife and two children are tossed into the current.

programme.desc: In 24-hour period thunderstorms, multiple suns, rainbows and night mirages change the Earth's sky.

programme.desc: From the lack of predators, certain species take control and invade our ecosystem, such as the Burmese python, the snake-like fish in the Potomac and killer bees.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Sinkholes
programme.desc: Sinkholes generate below the surface of the earth and will swallow anything above the surface. In North America, there are hundreds of thousands of sinkholes alone.

programme.title: Weird Earth: Blood Moons and Mud Explosions
programme.desc: A Swiss mountain seems to be squirting out its insides. A moon with a halo appears and seems to trigger bizarre human behaviour. And glowing green geese are filmed flying over Canada.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: The Tourniquet/ Burning Desire
programme.desc: DNA evidence found on a murder victim leads to the arrest of Houston's notorious 'tourniquet killer;' after a young woman is found shot and burned in California, investigators spend years trying to pin the rap on the woman's boyfriend and his cousin.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Man in the Shadows/ The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A DNA hit sends an ex-convict back to prison; a hitchhiker is murdered in California.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Reconstructing Murder/ Fire Flicks
programme.desc: Advances in forensic clay modeling help to identify a victim; two boys like setting fires.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: The Sunday Morning Slasher
programme.desc: Police in Ann Arbor, Detroit and Houston attempt to catch Coral Eugene Watts, whom they suspect is a serial killer. Their attempts are fruitless, but he is caught when two of his victims don't die, who identify him. He then confesses to 13 murders.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Killer on Campus/ The Bow Hunter
programme.desc: In 1969, a first-year law student is found shot twice in the head with nylon stockings wrapped around her neck, but police are unable to find the killer until they get a hand from DNA evidence 31 years later. A man confesses to killing a hunter.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: A Killer Slips Away
programme.desc: The loving aunt of a close-knit family was stabbed to death in her home and it took two decades for detectives to discover that a clue lay hidden in plain sight for 24 years.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Little Girl Lost
programme.desc: A young girl is kidnapped and killed on her way home from a costume party. Ten years later, a detective's obsessive attention to detail exposing a shocking mistake that kept a suspect on the street for 10 years.

programme.title: The First 48: Jacked
programme.desc: In Dallas, a young father is ambushed at a gas station and Detective Steve David needs to track down the killers, before the trail goes cold. Then in Miami, a beloved local rapper is gunned down at his car wash and Detectives suspect it was an inside job.

programme.title: The First 48: Fast Friends/ The Thin Line
programme.desc: In Cleveland, a young father is murdered in his car, and detectives discover his friend may know who pulled the trigger. In Tulsa, the homicide team goes on the hunt for a shotgun-wielding killer who tore a family apart.

programme.title: The First 48: Spree Killer
programme.desc: Tulsa's most vulnerable members find themselves potential victims of a possible spree killer. Detective Max Ryden does all he can to try and stop the murderer from upping their body count.

programme.title: The First 48: The Deadliest Sin/ Bloodlines
programme.desc: In Mobile, the murder of a 19-year old becomes personal when the team learns he is Det. Jermaine Rogers' cousin. In Tulsa, a 31-year old mother is gunned down in front of her home by an unlikely suspect.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Fe-mail
programme.desc: The Joker that absolutely hates massages; and the length of time it took the make-up team to get Joe all doled up for his debut as a female techie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: All the Wrong Moves
programme.desc: What prop does Murr carry almost daily? Which Jokers danced in their high school musical?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bidder Loser
programme.desc: The guys ask strangers to help them bury bizarre items, and then they try to cling onto strangers’ cars. The big loser makes enemies at an auction house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Water Torture
programme.desc: The guys spin a wheel and creep out shoppers at the mall. And tonight's punishment leaves one Joker soaked, enraged, and totally shocked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Swim Shady
programme.desc: The guys hit some bad reception working at a desk. Plus, tonight's big loser takes photos of a water aerobics class, but ends up drowning in shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 5
programme.desc: The guys dine and discuss their week. Find out who can make the best meal and how long Q's beard has become.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 6
programme.desc: The guys put their culinary skills to the test by serving dishes the viewers requested. Plus, find out if Joe grew a mustache.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: To Nightmare Manor
programme.desc: The crew answers a call at a haunted house. While they search for the source of the fire, each of them is forced to confront their greatest fears.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: A Christmas Story
programme.desc: Lucy, Andy, Ike and Granny try to get Eddie into the Christmas spirit. Chief has a special gift that may just do the trick.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pantsing With the Stars
programme.desc: The guys pair up to share educational ideas with perplexed parents, then teach Krav Maga to martial arts newbies. When one joker refuses, he becomes the big loser, and faces an opponent that scares the pants off him.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Wait, My Chair!
programme.desc: Michael shows a caterer the true power of dairy products, and an antique store customer is stunned when a species of termite chews through the scenery.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Speed Thieves
programme.desc: Michael adds spice to lunch at a diner, and at a furniture store, he shows his co-worker that impossible things can happen in the blink of an eye.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Impractically Carbonaro Jokers Effect
programme.desc: Four very impractical assistants invade a coffee bar to help Michael stun customers, but they quickly discover the joke is on them.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Kind of Like a Seafoam Green
programme.desc: Michael shows shoppers how to manipulate solid objects and reveals how vacuums work. Plus, one man's day becomes very colorful and confusing.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Ron and Tammys

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Born and Raised
programme.desc: Leslie falls prey to some 'gotcha' journalism while promoting her new book. Ann is determined to bond with Ron and April.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Pawnee Rangers
programme.desc: In an effort to protest the inequality of Ron's boys-only trip, Leslie takes the girls on a trip of their own.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Save JJ's

programme.desc: As concerns begin to grow over the Coronavirus, Kim and Kourtney head to Paris for the Yeezy season 8 launch. Kris and Corey welcome a new puppy, and Khloé and Scott’s prank on Kris continues taking yet another turn.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Journey to Healing
programme.desc: Scott experiences some troubling health issues and Kim heads to Washington to meet with some formerly incarcerated women. Khloe is determined to cure Kim of her fear of spiders.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fake It Til You Make It
programme.desc: Kendall, Kylie and Khloé undergo a prosthetics makeover in hopes of experiencing a 'normal' day out. Meanwhile Scott is feeling insecure about his place in the family and Kris is resistant to Corey's idea of fun.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Kardashian Curse
programme.desc: Khloé heads to Napa with Kourtney and Kris where her tough decision to move forward with her divorce is made even tougher by Kris's actions. Meanwhile, Scott goes to great lengths to rid himself of the alleged Kardashian Curse.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Snow You Didn't! (Part 1)
programme.desc: Kris orchestrates a surprise family vacation to Vail, but their nostalgic getaway hits a bump when the family learns that Rob has proposed to Blac Chyna back in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Snow You Didn't! (Part 2)
programme.desc: The family vacation in Vail continues as everyone tries to process the shocking news of Rob's engagement. Meanwhile Scott tries to prove he can behave himself for the rest of the trip.

programme.title: Chopped: Viewers Rule
programme.desc: The chefs gear up for difficult baskets when they find out that Chopped viewers have selected all their ingredients. A stunning but texturally challenging dessert meets a canned meat product in the appetizer basket.

programme.title: Chopped: Pizza Poetry
programme.desc: The judges are in for a pizza party to remember. A piece of pork that takes up much of the first basket has the competitors getting their hands dirty.

programme.title: Chopped: Extreme Halloween
programme.desc: Halloween means very frightening surprises in the baskets for the chefs. In the first round, they encounter a very troublesome, bloody protein.

programme.title: Chopped: Spooked
programme.desc: Chefs are spooked by what they get in the baskets for Halloween! Round one starts with a meat platter and contestants find an ingredient staring back at them from the entree basket. The final two create desserts using Halloween candy.

programme.title: Chopped: Pancake Panic
programme.desc: The competing chefs get a ton of sugar in the first basket in the form of a breakfast classic with a twist, and the level of cooking in the entree round seems extraordinary as the chefs excitedly dig into a seven-layer dip.

programme.title: Chopped: Lighten Up!
programme.desc: Four chefs who specialize in cooking lighter, healthier fare are challenged to make delicious, lean dishes in the Chopped kitchen. Low-calorie chips and some leafy greens inspire creativity in the first round.

programme.title: Chopped: Midnight Snack Attack
programme.desc: The four chefs in this special competition are tasked with making the perfect midnight meal. In the first round, fried foods and a trendy cocktail are creatively reimagined in appetizers.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Campfire Cookout
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is putting together some delicious campfire favourites and reliving her childhood by camping out in her backyard. Her husband Nick is building the fire, and they've invited some old camp buddies to join the fun.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Generational Goodies
programme.desc: Molly Yeh's mom comes to the farm to share a few family recipes before baby arrives. Molly makes pastrami eggrolls as a tribute to her mother's hometown to go with citrus chicken rice bowls and grilled veggies.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: New Farm Traditions
programme.desc: Molly is putting a fresh spin on the classic farm lunch. There's her easy garlic and onion challah bread, chopped salad with crumbled feta and her all-time favourite creamy homemade hummus.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Harvest Pre-Haul
programme.desc: It's beet harvest pre-haul time, and Molly Yeh is making the coziest foods imaginable to keep her husband, Nick, primed for the work ahead. She whips up her tender spiced beef hotdish with bacon jalapeno cornbread, loaded potato skins.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Father and Daughter
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is busy working on a mom-made lunch for her father-daughter duo on the farm.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Cheap And Easy
programme.desc: Ree Drummond has been stocking up for four make-ahead meals that are as cheap as they are easy to make. There's inexpensive slow cooker teriyaki ribs with quick slaw, Tex-Mex meatballs, BBQ chicken baked potatoes and a cheesy rigatoni pepper bake.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Osage Cowboy's Lunch
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making a classic cowboy lunch for her husband, Ladd, and the other cowboys. She starts with a cheeseburger meatloaf that's everything they love about two favorite foods in one dish.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: No Cooking Required
programme.desc: Ree Drummond features some fuss-free recipes that require no cooking. Dishes include her Ranch Muffuletta Sandwich with Spicy Olive Spread and a Chinese Chicken Salad that features rotisserie chicken and ginger.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Double Dinners
programme.desc: Ree Drummond has a half-empty nest while her daughters are off at college, but she still needs good, hearty food at her fingertips for her hungry teenage sons. So she's cooking up dishes that she can serve half now and freeze the rest for another time.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Oh Boy
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is cooking for her permanently hungry teenage sons. First, she makes buffalo chicken totchos that are a blend of potato tots, nachos and wings.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Around the World in Three Carts
programme.desc: In round one, the chefs must create an international dish using items found only in the clearance carts. Next, the chefs set out to make a delicious dessert until Guy surprises them with a red light special.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Spice Masters
programme.desc: In Flagstaff, Arizona, the Fieris head to a farmers' market where they find fresh organic chicken and roasted green chiles. Then, they fly through the Grand Canyon and cook up a homemade chicken taco dinner on a houseboat before landing in New Mexico.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: GGG vs. Iron Chefs
programme.desc: Three of Grocery Games' biggest winners are taking each other on to earn the right to battle an Iron Chef. First they must flip the ingredients in the camping classic, s'mores, into a high-end dinner.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Super Stocked: An Offal Halloween
programme.desc: In a spook-tacular Halloween cook-off our chefs start out with some pumpkin bowling to determine the frightening ingredients in their daring dish. Next, competitors rummage through some creepy clearance carts to find ingredients to make a dish.

programme.desc: A married couple owns a wine bar and loves to entertain, but their home's not quite ready for guests due to its compartmentalized layout, unstable balconies and an enormous, rotting tree.

programme.desc: Kevin disapproves of how much money Danny is spending tricking out his dream FMC Motorhome, but Danny has a surprise plan to help him get over it. Later, he builds a movie replica bike to commemorate a customer's lost friend.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Get Your Kicks
programme.desc: Danny takes on a Route 66-inspired Chevy for the famed highway's biggest fan, and later teams up with his good buddy, American Restoration's Rick Dale, on an unusual project for a customer.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Black, White and Hotrod All Over
programme.desc: Danny and the boys meet with a customer who wants a wicked paint job to match his 1959 Anglia dragster. Meanwhile, Shannon and Ryan are building a custom Harley Davidson Bagger for a client using a repurposed police bike.

programme.title: Counting Cars: School of Rick

programme.title: Counting Cars: Boogie Down Buggy

programme.title: Counting Cars: Blinged Out Blazer

programme.title: Counting Cars: '70s Scoot
